news_items.headline: Asia markets set to fall as Iran rules out direct U.S. talks despite reviewing proposal
news_items.description: Asia-Pacific markets looked set to mostly fall after Iran signaled it had no intention of holding direct talks with the United States.

news_items.headline: How the Iran war could rattle the global economy long after hostilities end
news_items.description: A reopening of the critical Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has effectively closed to oil tankers, won't immediately restore the world to its pre-conflict state.

news_items.headline: White House says Trump will meet Xi in China in May
news_items.description: A long-awaited meeting between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping will take place in Beijing on May 14 and 15, the White House said.

news_items.headline: Sen. Warren: DOD answers show no anti-corruption protocols for Trump children
news_items.description: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

news_items.headline: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
news_items.description: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

news_items.headline: Tensions flare during Iran briefing on Capitol Hill
news_items.description: Much of the frustration during the briefing for the House Armed Services Committee focused on the prospect of sending U.S. ground troops to Iran, sources said.

news_items.headline: Trump claims progress with Iran as Tehran rejects ceasefire proposal
news_items.description: Iran has rejected the Trump administration's 15-point proposal to end the war, contradicting the president's claims that Iranian leaders are eager to end the co...

news_items.headline: Democrat flips state seat near Mar-a-Lago, raising new warning signs for Trump
news_items.description: As the war with Iran rages on and gas prices keep climbing, President Trump is now feeling the political pain in his own front yard. Ed O'Keefe has more.

news_items.headline: Would U.S. or Israel agree to any of Iran's conditions to end the war?
news_items.description: Iran has sent the U.S. a counterproposal for possible peace talks, including five conditions to end the war. Retired U.S. Navy Vice Admiral Robert Murrett joins

news_items.headline: Iran rejects Trump’s peace proposal
news_items.description: The Iranian regime has rejected President Trump’s 15-point peace proposal to end the war. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.
